name: memory_backlinks
description: Find which of your memories refer back to this one.

name: memory_browse
description: Look over the memories you have saved so far.

name: memory_delete
description: Forget a memory you no longer need to keep.

name: memory_link
description: Connect two memories so you can recall them together later.

name: memory_read
description: Read a memory you saved earlier, by its exact location.

name: memory_search
description: Search your memories about the user and past conversations by keyword.

name: memory_write
description: Save a memory about the user or your past conversations so you can recall it later — names, preferences, what came up, and anything worth remembering.
